calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher C. Nolan, Esq. (415-984-0416) of Brent, Fiol & Nolan LLP for MARY JO MACK, petitioner and moving party
No other appearances.

RULING - PETITIONER MARY JO MACK'S Motion To Compel is granted. Motion for sanctions and attorneys fees are denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson, Clerk: L. Fong, Not Reported. (302/MJM)
